293NS.00 - Basic informationNational Specific Template (NST) required for insurance and reinsurance firms to report basic information about the submission and to show which of the templates NS.01 - NS.11 are also being completed as part of this submission. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.0Reporting 31/12/2024
294NS.01 - With-profits value of bonusNational Specific Template (NST) required in NS.01 where the firm as a whole is a single with-profits fund, and NSR.01 otherwise for each with-profits fund. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.1Reporting 31/12/2024
295NS.02 - With-profits assets and liabilitiesNational Specific Template (NST) required in NS.02 where the firm as a whole is a single with-profits fund, and NST.02 otherwise for each with-profits fund. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.2Reporting 31/12/2024
296NS.03 - Material pooling arrangementsNational Specific Template (NST) required to enable basic analysis of the effect of material pooling arrangements on the undertaking's performance. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.3Reporting 31/12/2024
297NS.04 - Assessable mutualsNational Specific Template (NST) required to obtain the supplementary call history by each policy year for each class of mutual members, to show changes in the call pattern (at annual intervals), and to collect data to show the financial performance of the mutual. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.4Reporting 31/12/2024
298NS.05 - Revenue account lifeNational Specific Template (NST) required for the total life business, for each ring-fenced fund and for the remaining part. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.5Reporting 31/12/2024
299NS.06 - Business model analysis (life)National Specific Template (NST) required collecting business model analysis information for the latest financial year as well as forecasts for three years following the current reporting period. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.6Reporting 31/12/2024
300NS.07 - Business model analysis non-lifeNational Specific Template (NST) required for (re)insurance firms to report forward looking information to the PRA so that the firm's expectation of its sources of revenue over the financial year ended and the coming three financial years is transparent. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.7Reporting 31/12/2024
301NS.08 - Business model analysis - financial guarantee insurersNational Specific Template (NST) required to collect sufficient information about the portfolio of securities against which financial guarantees have been given to facilitate business model analysis. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.8Reporting 31/12/2024
302NS.09 - Best estimate assumptions for life insurance risksNational Specific Template (NST) required to give an indication of changes in the valuation basis, how the basis compares with experience and the variability of the firm's recent experience. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.9Reporting 31/12/2024
303NS.10 - Projection of future cash flows (best estimate - non-life: liability claim types)National Specific Template (NST) required for insurance and reinsurance firms to report best estimate cash-flows relating to bodily injury claims and latent claim obligations of non-life business. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.10Reporting 31/12/2024
304NS.11 - Non-life claim development information (general liability sub-classes)National Specific Template (NST) required for non-life claim development information (general liability sub-classes). To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.11Reporting 31/12/2024
305NS.12 - The Society of Lloyd's solvency capital requirementNational Specific Template (NST) required to report how Lloyd's solvency capital requirement (SCR) will be covered by eligible own funds. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.12Reporting 31/12/2024
306NS.13 - The Society of Lloyd's minimum capital requirementNational Specific Template (NST) required to report matters required by the rules for the Solvency II Minimum Capital Requirement Part. To be completed using the appropriate workbook in Chapter 8 of the Reporting Part. Reporting 8.13Reporting 31/12/2024
